inventory.title: Inventory Automation
inventory.description: Automatically update product inventory settings when group buy campaigns start or end.
inventory.enableLabel: Enable 'Continue selling when out of stock' on campaign creation
inventory.enableHelp: Ensures customers can join the group buy even if physical inventory is zero.
inventory.disableLabel: Disable 'Continue selling when out of stock' when campaign ends or is deleted
inventory.disableHelp: Reverts the product to its original inventory behavior once the campaign is inactive.

future.title: Future Upgrades
future.description: Manage experimental features and future app enhancements.
future.text: New beta features and automation settings will appear here in future updates.

deleteModal.title: Delete this campaign?
deleteModal.warning: This action can’t be undone. All campaign data will be permanently lost.
deleteModal.checkbox: I understand this action cannot be undone.

emptyState.heading: Manage your group buy campaigns
emptyState.description: Create your first campaign to start offering group buy discounts to your customers.

searchEmpty.title: No Items found
searchEmpty.description: Try changing the filters or search term
